comments.body: ## [CodSpeed Performance Report](https://codspeed.io/aio-libs/multidict/branches/segfault_protected_view_objects) ### Merging #1163 will **not alter performance** Comparing segfault_protected_view_objects (01ef6ab) with master (fea968f) ### Summary `✅ 244` untouched benchmarks
